feature.name: JSON Pointer resolve and set
feature.description: Extract RFC 6901 JSON Pointer parsing, resolve, set, and escape/unescape without importing jsonpointer.
included_behaviors: resolve pointers against nested dict/list documents
set values including array append via '-' token
escape and unescape ~ and / in token names
default values for missing paths and invalid escapes

entanglement.description: JSON Pointer couples token unescaping, sequence vs mapping dispatch, EndOfList sentinel handling, and in-place deepcopy mutation paths.
signals: walk/get_part distinguishes Mapping vs Sequence indexing
set handles '-' append vs mapping assignment
invalid ~ escapes validated at parse time

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import EndOfList, JsonPointer, JsonPointerException, resolve_pointer, set_pointer, escape, unescape
